title: Issue with changing the URL
excerpt:
Hi 
i tried to change the url of my account anf i got an error. 
  
I’ll be happy to get your response 
thanks

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I am facing the same problem “Error saving your changes”.
Please help us

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @cgoloe and @andrechamusca! Oftentimes this error pops up when the URL is already taken by another monday.com account. Write to us at support@monday.com if you’re still having issues changing the URL and we’d be happy to look into this with you!
